message:
fix(plan): resolve clippy lints in fixtures

- Move `fn recurse` before `let root` in compute_dag_cost (items_after_statements)
- Use `let...else` for root extraction (manual_let_else)
- Replace `map_or(true, ...)` with `is_none_or(...)` (unnecessary_map_or)
- Replace `if let Some...else true` with `is_none_or(...)` (option_if_let_else)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
